lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how's life as a pirate?

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: What kind of question is that? How's life as a... I dunno. Whatever it is that you do for a living.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a freelance troubleshooter.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: What does that entail then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mostly killing things for money and delivering items around the planet for people.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I collect stuff.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: So how's that life?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can't complain, can't complain...

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Well, there you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aren't you a little short for a pirate?

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: My mother was a gnome. Apparently it was a very painful birth.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: More info than I wanted, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Sorry, can't stop, the Captain will have my guts for garters if he catches me slacking off talking to the stowaway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not a stowaway! I was invited aboard!

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Yeah, whatever [guy/lady], it doesn't really matter who you are I'll get in trouble!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know, I've always wondered what life as a pirate actually entails.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Well, at the moment it mostly involves being asked random questions by a stowaway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not a stowaway! I was invited aboard! By Lokar! Ask him!

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Hey, whatever [love/pal]. Just make sure the captain doesn't catch you, pirates don't like stowaways much.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Ah, good day to you [milady/sirrah]! Your face is unfamiliar, did you perhaps join us aboard the ship at Lunar Isle?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, Lokar offered me a lift in Rellekka actually.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Oh, really? You don't look like a Fremennik to me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well... I kind of am, and I kind of aren't. It's a long story.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Sorry I don't have time to hear it then! See you around young fremennik-who-is-not-really-a-fremennik!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 'Bye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Brrrr! Its cold up here!

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: You think this is cold? Up by Acheron it gets so cold that when you talk you see the words freeze in the air in front of you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: REALLY?

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Nah, not really. I was exaggerating for humourous effect. It is very very cold though!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Hello to you too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yar! We be pirates, yar! Avast, ye scurvy land-lubbing lychee!

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Please don't talk like that, it is extremely irritating.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Also, please don't call me a lychee, whatever that may be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Okay. Sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: ARGH! SOUND THE ALARM! STOWAWAY ON BOARD! STOWAWAY ON BOARD!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No! I'm not a stowaway! Honest! I was invited here!

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Oh, sorry, my mistake then.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: You must admit you do look a lot like a stowaway though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why, what do they usually look like?

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Erm... I've never actually met one...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay then...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... You're a pirate, huh?

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: It's what it says on my pay-packet at the end of the month.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's that working out for you?

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Pretty good so far. All the grog and loot that we can plunder, plus full medical including dental.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean you have insurance?

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Not as such. If any of us get sick we kidnap a doctor and don't let him go until we're better.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: You'd be surprised what an incentive for expert health care that is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can imagine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Hello there. So what brings you aboard the Lady Zay?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I was planning on visiting the Moon Clan, but I have to say your ship is very impressive.

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: Aye, she's a beauty alright! The Lady Zay has been my home for many hard months, through storm and sun, and she always gets us to here we were headed!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, she's certainly one of the finest boats I've seen on my travels!

lines.speaker: Murky Pat
lines.text: That she is [lad/lass], that she is.
